footer.heading: Got an idea worth designing?
footer.tagline: Product designer & front-end developer crafting bold, considered digital experiences.

home.seoDescription: Hassan Adel — graphic designer crafting bold visual identities, illustration, print, digital and packaging work.
home.heroSubtitle: A graphic designer crafting branding, illustration, print, digital and packaging work with a sharp eye for detail and a love for bold blue.
home.avatarAlt: Illustrated 3D avatar of Hassan Adel surrounded by design tool icons
home.videoParagraph1: For the past six years I've turned client briefs into identities people actually remember — sketching logotypes past midnight, obsessing over kerning nobody else will notice, and pushing every project one revision further than "good enough." I'm not a faceless studio; I'm one designer who reads every brief twice, argues gently for the bolder direction, and stays close through launch instead of disappearing after handoff.
home.videoParagraph2: If the work below speaks for itself, this thirty-second hello is for everything the portfolio can't show — how I think, how I work, and why clients keep coming back for the next project.
home.projectsError: Couldn't load projects right now. Please refresh the page.
home.projectsEmpty: No published work yet — check back soon.
home.processSubtitle: A simple process built for great outcomes.

discover.title: Discover
discover.body: Understand the brand, the audience and the problem before a single pixel moves.

design.title: Design
design.body: Explore bold directions, refine the strongest one, and build a system around it.

deliver.title: Deliver
deliver.body: Ship polished, production-ready assets — and stay close through launch.

about.seoDescription: Hassan Adel — graphic designer. Background, process and the kind of work I take on.
about.heading: Hi, I'm Hassan Adel — a designer obsessed with clarity.
about.paragraph1: I'm a graphic designer working across branding, illustration, print, digital and packaging. My process blends sharp strategic thinking with a genuine love of craft — every project starts with a question, not a template.
about.paragraph2: Over the years I've partnered with startups, studios and independent brands who wanted work that felt considered, distinctive and built to last.

current.title: Independent Designer
current.body: Partnering directly with founders and studios on branding and visual systems.

senior.title: Senior Graphic Designer
senior.body: Led identity and packaging work for a range of consumer brands.

early.title: Graphic Designer
early.body: Built a foundation across print, digital and illustration work.

contact.seoDescription: Get in touch with Hassan Adel about a project.
contact.heading: Let's build something bold together.
contact.intro: Tell me a little about your project and timeline — I typically reply within one business day.
